title: Voluntary Liquidation — Company & LLP | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Voluntary liquidation under Section 59 IBC. Company & LLP winding up without NCLT. Declaration of solvency, special resolution, liquidator appointment.
bodyText:
HEADING1:Voluntary Liquidation — Company & LLP | Virtual Auditor

What is Voluntary Liquidation — Company & LLP | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Voluntary liquidation under Section 59 IBC. Company & LLP winding up without NCLT. Declaration of solvency, special resolution, liquidator appointment.
Virtual Auditor provides professional voluntary liquidation — company & llp | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?
• Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) with 14+ years experience
• IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333)
• Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
• Associate Company Secretary (ACS)
• Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai
• 100+ complex valuations completed
HEADING2:Our Approach
We combine deep regulatory expertise with AI-powered tools to deliver accurate, defensible, and timely results. Every engagement is led by CA V. Viswanathan, ensuring senior-level attention.
HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Virtual Auditor handles company incorporation and related registrations through the MCA portal. Our process is fully digital, using SPICe+ (INC-32), AGILE-PRO, and other integrated forms for seamless registration.

The incorporation process covers: name reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A), DIN application for directors, DSC procurement, drafting of MOA and AOA, SPICe+ form filing, PAN/TAN allotment, GST registration, EPFO/ESIC registration (where applicable), and professional tax registration. Post-incorporation, we assist with statutory register maintenance, board resolutions, and annual compliance setup.

Our team has incorporated 500+ companies across diverse sectors. We serve entrepreneurs and businesses in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and across India with end-to-end incorporation support.
